title: CVE-2026-15738: AWS Load Balancer Controller
summary: [P2] CVE-2026-15738 is an incorrect rule precedence ordering issue in the Gateway API listener rule generation logic, which could lead to cross-namespace traffic interception. The vulnerability is currently not exploited in the wild, but a PoC exists. Why now: Newly disclosed vulnerability with a PoC available (confidence: 0.80)
